title: Claude Mythos is FINALLY here (Fable 5)
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, described as their first Mythos-class model. The model achieves top performance on benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code, and demonstrates capabilities in vision, long-context tasks, and code generation.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as the company's first Mythos-class model. It reports top benchmark results on SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code, along with demonstrated capabilities in vision, long-context tasks, and code generation. The takeaway is a positioning of Fable 5 as a step up in coding and multimodal performance relative to prior benchmarks.
